title: Worker handoff envelope
description: Written by the worker as its final action to state/handoffs/<stage-id>.json. tick.sh polls for this file and treats it as the sole completion signal. Process exit and log tail are fallback stuck-worker signals only.

stage_id.description: Stage id, matching the stage card filename slug and the state.yaml stages[].id value.

status.description: pass — all acceptance criteria satisfied, ready for verifier. fail — worker could not complete; verifier is not dispatched. partial — some deliverables written but constraints or criteria were not met.

deliverables.description: Relative paths (from repo root) of every file the worker created or modified. Must list at least the files in the stage card's Deliverables section.

notes.description: Free-text summary: what was done, any acceptance criteria believed satisfied, any open issues. Used verbatim in the stall marker when status=fail.

failed_acceptance.description: Optional. Indices (1-based) of acceptance criteria from the stage card that the worker could not satisfy. Informational for the operator; does not change tick.sh behaviour.

worker_identity.description: Optional. The canonical identity string of the worker agent, e.g. 'Codex GPT-5.3 <codex-gpt-5-3@local>'. Redundant with state.yaml but useful when reading the envelope in isolation.
